[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0010100 2
4 0010101 3
5 1010101 4
6 0001010 2
7 0000010 1

01 0000000 a match 0 1 2
12 0100000 1
23 1010101 4 match 5
34 0001000 1
45 0110000 2
56 0000111 3
67 0000000 a match 0 1 2
70 1101000 3

02 0000000 a match 0 1 2
13 1110101 5

35 0001000 1
46 0010110 3
57 0000011 2
60 1101000 3
71 0001000 1

03 0010101 3 match 4
14 0000001 1

36 0000010 1 match 7
47 0000010 1 match 7

61 0001000 1
72 0100000 1

15 0110000 2

51 0000010 1 match 7

05 0010000 1
